titleStmt.title: SII 26.28: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 28. (A.R. No. 28 of 1909.) KUṈṈAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fourth pillar in the same place.
This record commences with the praśasti, Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga of the king.

It registers the remission of tax by the person mentioned below in favour of the deity described in No. 24 above, of the dēvadāna lands situated in all the villages including Seṅgaṇi, Palavānkuḍi, Puravuvari-nallūr, Śiru-Veṭṭivayal, Maṇiyāttiṟal and Pālaivāyil belonging to Aiññūṟṟuvaṉ Uyyavandān alias Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍāḻvān Kāṅgāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻmā
tu viḷaṅka jayamātuviru
mpa nilamakaḷ nilava mala
rmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta
maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilai
keṭa villavarkulaitara vikka
lan ciṅkaḷaṉ melkaṭal
pāyat tikkanaittun=tan
cakkaranaṭātti vijaiyaā
bhiṣekam paṇṇi vira
siṅhāsanattu Ava
nimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
viṟṟirun=taruḷiya tribhuvanaccakra
vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
ka coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟ
patāvatu rājarājappāṇṭinā
ṭṭu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tenā
ṟṟuppokku tirukkunṟakkuṭi
tirumalaiyuṭaiya mahādeva
ṟkku Aññūṟṟuvan Uyyavan=tā
nāna Ataḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvā
neṉ tenāṟṟuppokkil En
jivitamāyuḷḷa Ūr ceṅkaṇiyi
lum palavānkuṭiyilum puravu
varinallūrilum ciṟuveṭṭivaya
lilum maṇiyāttiṟalilum pā
laivāyililum maṟṟum Enjivita
māṉa Ūrkaḷil devatānamāyuḷḷa
nilaṅkaḷ Eṟṟaikkum Iṟaitavi
rttukkuṭuttu kallil veṭṭik kuṭu
tten Aññūṟṟuvan Uyyava
n=tānāṉa Ataḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvānāna
kāṅkeLeft unfinished; only a few letters are wanting.
Digital edition of SII 26.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
